10562430.title: The Sheriffs Are Coming
10562430.description: Sheriffs Tommy and Craig confront the lodger who left owing three months rent. Also, Lawrence and Kev track down the garage that botched a repair on a valuable sports car, and Ken Warby meets a debtor who doesn't want to admit who he really is.
